product: Genie One enhancements and bug fixes
tagline: Account level Genie customization: You can now customize Genie at the account level, including colors, a logo, a markdown welcome message, and pinned content.
what_it_does: Account level Genie customization: You can now customize Genie at the account level, including colors, a logo, a markdown welcome message, and pinned content. Email tool for scheduled tasks: Scheduled tasks now use an email tool to send emails, enabling more customized email formats and send conditions. Custom MCP server fix (Public Preview): Fixed an issue that prevented custom MCP servers from being used in Genie One.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
limitations: Triggering actions in Databricks from Slack
Creating Genie agents or Genie Agents.
key_takeaway: Account level Genie customization: You can now customize Genie at the account level, including colors, a logo, a markdown welcome message, and pinned content.
